Then fprintf writes \"%d %d\" with ecx=r12d=800 (height), r8d=r13d=600 (width). So output is \"800 600\". That matches!

So width=600, height=800? No: ecx is passed as 3rd arg (width), edx is 4th arg (height). So width=600, height=800. But the PPM is \"800 600\" which would mean width=800, height=600.
